The gentleman is the teacher of the people, and therefore stands at the side of the road. This is the beginning of his function. The real is the beginning of his study. If the gentleman's mind is not broad, his humanity will be weak; if his knowledge is not deep, his country will be in danger.

If the gentleman makes justice his near neighbor, he will make wisdom his travel companion. Even if he does not build a city in the courtyard, he has not thought of ritual in the hall of audience.
